feedback.text: Hello I'm Peter, writing in from Sweden. I'm writing in because developers makes games you buy unplayable without any end of life plan. Especially when they made sure it has to have online on all the time even when you can play it as a solo experience. Making some of my favorite games unplayable today such as darkspore, wildstar. Just feels bad that today when you buy a video game there is no security for how long you can play it. could be a week or for years and you have no say in it.
